concerns.text: FR-010 (retry logic with exponential backoff) lacks explicit traceability annotation to User Story 4. While the requirement clearly supports edge case handling, adding a '*Traceability: Anchored to User Story 4*' note would improve documentation consistency with other FRs.

SC-013 (dataset scope validation) traces to FR-001/FR-002 but lacks explicit user story anchor. Adding '*Traceability: Anchored to User Story 1*' would maintain consistency with other SCs that explicitly note their user story connections.

SC-014 (hyperbolic volume data completeness) lacks traceability annotation. Given FR-014 explicitly anchors to User Story 1, SC-014 should similarly note '*Traceability: Anchored to User Story 1*' for documentation consistency.
